jsonLd.title: Jaypore is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Jaypore invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jaypore:
Jaypore is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypore!
